Birthday Part 3  - On Top Of The World (literally ) …Just how I like it ✨  36th Floor, Danang, Vietnam  P.S If you’re in Danang, do not miss this place. Every woman needs a moment like this 🫶🏻 Sitting on a rooftop…Realising she’s exactly who she needed to be 🩷 It’s the feeling of being exactly where you need to be ✨ 📍 Cielo rooftop - @lafestaphuquoc by Hilton, Phu Quoc Vietnam #vietnam #phuquoc #hrishitaachopra #contentcreator #luxuryhotel

3 Days at the most beautiful hotel in Vietnam 🇻🇳 I came here to see a room, And I left remembering what it feels like to stop thinking…. Every corner. Every angle. Every moment of light. @lafestaphuquoc - a curio collection by Hilton, didn’t just give me a view, They gave me permission to disappear into fantasy 🫶🏻 #phuquoc #vietnam #luxuryhotels #lafesta #hilton Luxury hotels in Sunset town, Phu Quoc, Vietnam 🇻🇳

There’s a moment when you stop trying & just be  @radissonbluresort_phuquoc gave me that moment ✨ Lying in a hammock between ancient palm trees, watching nothing happen, Hearing the sound of ocean, & feeling everything The kind of luxury that heals  @radissonbluphuquoc #RadissonPhuQuoc #SlowLuxury #vietnam #phuquoc #HrishitaaChopra PhuQuoc luxury resorts in Vietnam

Walked into my birthday year with the same hair... Walked into my birthday week as a different woman..✂️ New chapter, new cut, same girl  Let the birthday week begin  #HairTransformation #NewHairWhoThis #birthdayweek #HrishitaaChopra HaircutTransition NewChapter IndianContentCreator HairGoals

70 years of light - 13 May✨  Gurudev, I don’t have the words and honestly, every time I’m near you, i realise I never do. There’s nothing to ask. Nothing to wish for. Nothing missing. That stillness..That’s what you gave me As I say - an elixir for life.  I smile with my mouth wide open every single time I see you not because I try to, but because I simply cannot help it. Thank you for teaching me & all of us, the actual art of living, And for bringing me back to it every single time I drift away. Happy 70th Birthday @gurudev  Blessed to have been in your presence, again and again and again   #HappyBirthdayGurudev #Gurudev70 #SriSriRaviShankar #TheArtOfLiving Blessed Gratitude @artofliving #13thmay

She has two sides ✨ One that blooms in gardens, Chase sunsets, And smells like Bulgarian rose at dusk. Another that walks into rooms And changes the temperature, Cardamom, Turkish Rose & the spicy kick of Pink Pepper. @garsparfums gave me both - Exceptional & Twilight ✨ I didn’t know I needed two signature scents for my two sides!
